## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + build + test + deps:check)
- [ ] TSDoc updated (formula, units, constraints, citation, `@example`) for any changed export
- [ ] Numeric changes are pinned with golden/textbook/property tests
- [ ] Decision-support results still return `Explained<T>`
- [ ] Dependency direction respected (no upward or cyclic imports)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
